testcase.name: BeforeTest

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 145 Current browser version is 147.0.7727.116 with binary path C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe Host info: host: 'KEVIN', ip: '192.168.1.6' Build info: version: '4.8.2', revision: '826dbfc730' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.9' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--remote-allow-origins=*], extensions: []}}], desiredCapabilities=Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--remote-allow-origins=*], extensions: []}}}]
